title: Ability to copy board structure & automations (no items or updates)

posts.author: puck4007 (Donna)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like the ability to copy the board structure & automations (w/out items and updates).

When I need to duplicate a board, it is generally because I’ve found a board that I’ve created to be extremely useful and would like to use the same format for tracking in another area. Since the areas I track are intentionally separate, copying items into another board isn’t appropriate.

P.S. A 3rd party app isn’t an option since my company prohibits the use of third party apps within Monday.
